subcodes.first_line: O Bahman! Supplicate to God that thou mayest become as the clouds of winter, showering precious gems, and as a verdant garden, flowering in the paradise of the Lord [3.5s]... ...Thou hast asked regarding the names of the Prophets. “What is the wisdom”, thou hast inquired, “that despite the multitude of Prophets…
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بهمن از خدا بخواه که چون ابر بهمن گوهرفشان گردی و چون صحن چمن گلشن یزدان
subcodes.subjects: @differences between the Manifestations; station of distinction, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @oneness or innumerability of the Manifestations of God, @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @twofold; threefold station of the Manifestation of God
